name: Prompt Library
description: Version-controlled prompt library for authoring, searching, comparing, and testing prompts with full diff history and evaluation results.

page_briefs.prompts: Data table listing all prompts with columns for name, tags (colored pills), latest version number, last-modified date, and author avatar. Search bar and tag filter chips above the table. Bulk actions toolbar appears on row selection.
page_briefs.prompt-detail: Split layout with a rich-text prompt editor on the left featuring variable placeholders highlighted inline and a test-run button. Right panel shows version history as a vertical timeline with commit-style messages, version numbers, and restore buttons per entry.
page_briefs.prompt-compare: Side-by-side diff view at top with red/green line highlighting showing changes between two prompt versions. Below, an eval dashboard displays comparative test results: pass/fail counts, latency deltas, and quality score bar charts for each version.

shells.sidebar-main: Collapsible sidebar with prompt folder tree and main content area
